tests.scenario: Access to free meditation and relaxation content without subscription
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the content catalog
Verify that the catalog is accessible without a subscription
Browse through the catalog and access a guided meditation and a soothing sound
tests.expected_result: The system displays a catalog of free meditation and relaxation content, including guided meditations and soothing sounds, without requiring a subscription. The user can access and play the content successfully.

steps: Login to the system as a registered user
Navigate to the meditation tracking page
Record a new meditation session with a duration of 30 minutes
tests.expected_result: The system displays the updated meditation progress, including a total duration of 30 minutes and a frequency of 1 session

steps: Log in to the system with an active subscription
Navigate to the subscription management section
Initiate cancellation and confirm the cancellation
tests.expected_result: The subscription is cancelled, and the user receives a confirmation of the cancellation

tests.scenario: User accesses and plays a guided relaxation session
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the library section
Select a guided relaxation session from the library
Play the selected session and verify it starts correctly
tests.expected_result: The selected guided relaxation session plays without errors and the user can hear the content

steps: Launch the application and navigate to the sleep timer feature
Set a sleep timer for a duration of 30 minutes
Verify that the system does not disturb the user during the designated sleep period
tests.expected_result: The system successfully completes the sleep timer duration without disturbance, and the user is not notified during this time

tests.scenario: Generate sleep quality report for a user with varied sleep patterns
steps: Simulate user data collection for 7 consecutive nights with varying sleep durations and frequencies of awakenings
Record relaxation techniques used by the user each night
Generate a sleep quality report for the user through the system
tests.expected_result: The sleep quality report includes accurate data on sleep duration, frequency of awakenings, and relaxation techniques used, providing insights into the user's sleep patterns

tests.scenario: User accesses the meditation library and selects a session
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the meditation library
Browse through the library and select a meditation session of varying length (e.g., 5-minute, 10-minute, 30-minute)
Play the selected meditation session
tests.expected_result: The selected meditation session plays without interruption, and the user is able to listen to the guided meditation

tests.scenario: Validate sleep story feature plays soothing narratives and helps users fall asleep
steps: Pre-register a user and log in to the system
Navigate to the sleep story feature section
Select a sleep story and start playing it
tests.expected_result: The system plays a soothing narrative, and the user is able to fall asleep or report improved sleep quality

tests.scenario: User views personalized dashboard with meditation practice and sleep quality tracking
steps: Log in to the system with valid user credentials
Navigate to the personalized dashboard
Verify that the dashboard displays the user's meditation practice data, including duration and frequency
Verify that the dashboard displays the user's sleep quality data, including hours slept and sleep stages
tests.expected_result: The system displays a personalized dashboard with accurate and up-to-date meditation practice and sleep quality tracking data for the logged-in user

tests.scenario: Verify that the system provides a curated list of meditation sessions with varying lengths and categories
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the meditation session library
Verify that the library displays sessions with varying lengths (e.g., 5, 10, 20 minutes)
Verify that the library displays sessions categorized by topics (e.g., stress, sleep, focus)
tests.expected_result: The system displays a list of meditation sessions with different lengths and categories, allowing users to browse and select a suitable session for relaxation

tests.scenario: Validate seamless playback, pause, and resume of a meditation session
steps: Launch the meditation session player and select a meditation session
Start playing the meditation session and verify that it plays uninterrupted for 30 seconds
Pause the meditation session for 10 seconds
Resume playing the meditation session
tests.expected_result: The meditation session plays seamlessly for 30 seconds, pauses for 10 seconds, and then resumes playback from where it left off without any interruptions or quality issues

steps: Create a new user account and log in to the system
Complete a meditation session and log out
Log back in and navigate to the meditation history section
tests.expected_result: The system displays a list of completed meditation sessions for the user, including the date and duration of each session

tests.scenario: Verify curated list of free or low-cost health and wellness resources
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the resources section
Retrieve the list of health and wellness resources
Verify that each resource is clearly labeled as 'Free' or 'Requires Payment'
tests.expected_result: The system displays a curated list of free or low-cost health and wellness resources with clear indications of which resources are free and which require payment

tests.scenario: Access to free health content and visibility of limitations
steps: Navigate to the system's homepage
Search for a health-related topic
Access an article or content related to the searched topic without payment or subscription
tests.expected_result: The user can access the content without payment or subscription and is informed about any limitations on accessing full content or features

tests.scenario: Verifying and updating health and wellness resource availability and cost
steps: Precondition: A list of health and wellness resources is available in the system
Step 1: Simulate a regular update trigger in the system (e.g., scheduled daily update)
Step 2: Verify that the system checks for and retrieves the latest availability and cost information for each resource
Step 3: Confirm that the system updates the resource list with accurate and current information
tests.expected_result: The system successfully updates the list of health and wellness resources with accurate availability and cost information, ensuring that users can access resources without unexpected paywalls or subscription fees.
